rules: Max 8 words. Sentence case. AU English. No em/en dashes or smart quotes. No banned CSF phrases. Strict WAITLIST regime (Birchal's own CSF offer not live until 26 June 2026): no transaction verbs, no $ minimum, no priority/allocation/queue language. Aligned to the 4 V5c angles (investor-led, curiosity-led, market-dominance/64%, vision/Birchal Next), >=4 per angle. hook_audit.py standalone score >=4 on EVERY headline against clients/birchal/facts.json. Subject discipline: 'Birchal' = the company; the platform = 'the platform' / 'our platform'.
v5c_notes: Refreshed standalone set aligned to the V5c 4-angle structure. Supersedes the V5 single-file headline set for the V5c batch (kept separate, original V5 file untouched per scope discipline).

DOM headlines all rely on PLAT-005 (more than 64% of CSF in Australia), registered scoped wording, never combined with #1/first/largest. facts.json source_status OPEN: DRAFT/JB-review safe, MUST attach the exact public citation before any DOM headline goes live.

Every headline scored standalone with hook_audit.py --client-facts clients/birchal/facts.json: minimum 4, several 5. No unsourced market-leadership claim ('#1' / 'largest' / 'leading' / 'first' / valuation / $ minimum); the only market-share statement is the registered PLAT-005.
halbert_targets: Every headline scores >= 4 on hook_audit.py standalone against clients/birchal/facts.json. At least 2 A-pile signals each (specificity, curiosity gap, pattern interrupt, personal address, named entity). No statements without a hook.

_compliance_summary: All 21 headlines scored standalone with hook_audit.py --client-facts clients/birchal/facts.json: every one >= 4. Scanned against BANNED-CSF-PHRASES (zero matches), PREOFFER-VERBS (zero transaction verbs; 'invested'/'funded'/'waited' are past-tense factual references to historical raises, not a present CTA), em/en dash + smart-quote check (zero), max-8-words rule (all <= 8). DOM headlines use the registered PLAT-005 only (scoped 'crowd-sourced funding in Australia'); no other market-share / #1 / largest / leading / first claim. PLAT-005 source_status OPEN: DRAFT/JB-review safe, citation must be attached before live.
